title: iberis soyeri subsp. intermedia
intro: Iberis soyeri subsp. intermedia, also known as the Intermediate Candytuft, is a subspecies of the Iberis soyeri plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iberis soyeri subsp. intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
